chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Cr. Bail App. No. D – 50 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Fresh case 1. For orders on MA No.506/2024 (U/A) 2. For orders on office objections at Flag-A 3. For orders on MA No.507/2024 (Ex./A) 4. For hearing of bail application 31.05.2024 Mr. Muhammad Raza Soomro, Advocate for applicant / accused..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- 1. Urgency is granted. 2. Deferred. 3. Exemption is granted subject to all just legal exceptions. 4. Through this bail application, applicant/accused Jamal Khan S/o Sain Dad Narejo seeks protective bail in Crime No.02 of 2024, registered at Police Station Rustam, District Shikarpur u/s 365-A PPC and 6/7 of Anti-Terrorism Act, 1997. Learned Counsel contends that applicant is innocent, has been falsely implicated in this case. He further contends that applicant is ready to appear before the Court concerned along with an application U/S 498 CrPC to prove his innocence. However, he apprehends his immediate arrest as non-bailable warrant has been issued against him. Hence, he seeks protective bail. Without touching merits of the case, protective bail for a period of seven days w.e.f. 31.05.2024 to 06.06.2024 (both days inclusive) is granted to applicant subject to his furnishing a solvent surety in the sum of Rs.50,000/- (Rupees fifty thousand) and PR bond in the like amount to the satisfaction of Additional Registrar of this Court. Operation of non-bailable warrant in this case, if any, shall remain suspended during aforesaid period, in which applicant is directed to surrender before the Court concerned. This order shall cease to have its effect after expiry of above mentioned period or whenever applicant surrenders before the Court concerned, which one occurs earlier.

Operation of non-bailable warrant in this case, if any, shall remain suspended during aforesaid period, in which applicant is directed to surrender before the Court concerned. This order shall cease to have its effect after expiry of above mentioned period or whenever applicant surrenders before the Court concerned, which one occurs earlier. It is, however, made clear that in case applicant fails to surrender before the Court concerned within stipulated period, his bail bond shall stand automatically forfeited. The bail application stands disposed of in the above terms. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
